TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_imuy_longversion
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau sunis a yau tmayta tu biyat 'nay ta tateRaqan na peRasku.
S.PHON: jau sunis a jau tmajta tu βijat ʔnaj ta tatəʁaqan na pəʁasku.
S.FORM: yau sunis a yau tmayta tu biyat 'nay ta tateRaqan na peRasku.
S.PHON: jau sunis a jau tmajta tu βijat ʔnaj ta tatəʁaqan na pəʁasku.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩在看瓶子裡的青蛙.
There was a child looking at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: Raytunguzannati na wasu a yau biyat biyat a yau ta teRaqan na peRasku.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋuz~rannati na wasu a jau βijat βijat a jau ta təʁaqan na pəʁasku.
S.FORM: Raytunguzannati na wasu a yau biyat biyat a yau ta teRaqan na peRasku.
S.PHON: ʁajtuŋuz~rannati na wasu a jau βijat βijat a jau ta təʁaqan na pəʁasku.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗對著瓶子裡的青蛙叫.
The dog barked at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: maynepti sunis a yau atu 'nay sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: majnəpti sunis a jau atu ʔnaj siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.FORM: maynepti sunis a yau atu 'nay sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: majnəpti sunis a jau atu ʔnaj siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和羊睡覺了.
The child and the goat fell sleep.

S.FORM: nani biyat a yau nayzi ta teRaq na peRasku nani mzukatti.
S.PHON: nani βijat a jau najz~ri ta təʁaq na pəʁasku nani mz~rukatti.
S.FORM: nani biyat a yau nayzi ta teRaq na peRasku nani mzukatti.
S.PHON: nani βijat a jau najz~ri ta təʁaq na pəʁasku nani mz~rukatti.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從瓶子裡面跑出來.
The frog went out from the bottle.

S.FORM: biyat a yau izipna u mzukatti.
S.PHON: βijat a jau iz~ripna u mz~rukatti.
S.FORM: biyat a yau izipna u mzukatti.
S.PHON: βijat a jau iz~ripna u mz~rukatti.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙的身體出來囉.
The body of the frog came out.

S.FORM: ngidti qa iza qazukat pasazi tapeRaskuan.
S.PHON: ŋiɮti qa iz~ra qaz~rukat pasaz~ri tapəʁaskuan.
S.FORM: ngidti qa iza qazukat pasazi tapeRaskuan.
S.PHON: ŋiɮti qa iz~ra qaz~rukat pasaz~ri tapəʁaskuan.
S.TRANSL: 快要從那個......瓶子出來了.
It was about to come out of the ... the bottle.

S.FORM: yau sunis 'nay maynep Raynguanna.
S.PHON: jau sunis ʔnaj majnəp ʁajŋuanna.
S.FORM: yau sunis 'nay maynep Raynguanna.
S.PHON: jau sunis ʔnaj majnəp ʁajŋuanna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在睡覺,他不知道.
The child was sleeping. He didn't know.

S.FORM: nani masuat sunis a yau atu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani masuat sunis a jau atu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: nani masuat sunis a yau atu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani masuat sunis a jau atu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗起床.
The child and the dog woke up.

S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau ta teRaq na peRasku.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau ta təʁaq na pəʁasku.
S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau ta teRaq na peRasku.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau ta təʁaq na pəʁasku.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不在瓶子裡面.
The frog was not in the bottle.

S.FORM: pamengti sunis 'nay masuat ngid sikuzu.
S.PHON: paməŋti sunis ʔnaj masuat ŋiɮ sikuz~ru.
S.FORM: pamengti sunis 'nay masuat ngid sikuzu.
S.PHON: paməŋti sunis ʔnaj masuat ŋiɮ sikuz~ru.
S.TRANSL: 小孩只好起床,要穿鞋子.
The child got up and wanted to put on shoes.

S.FORM: tabuqti mqulingti 'nay peRasku 'nay.
S.PHON: taβuqti mquriŋti ʔnaj pəʁasku ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tabuqti mqulingti 'nay peRasku 'nay.
S.PHON: taβuqti mquriŋti ʔnaj pəʁasku ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子倒了.
The bottle fell.

S.FORM: nani yauti qaysuRanna na a Raytunguzti 'nay wasu a yau ta izaan na na inpanna.
S.PHON: nani jauti qajsuʁanna na a ʁajtuŋuz~rti ʔnaj wasu a jau ta iz~raan na na inpanna.
S.FORM: nani yauti qaysuRanna na a Raytunguzti 'nay wasu a yau ta izaan na na inpanna.
S.PHON: nani jauti qajsuʁanna na a ʁajtuŋuz~rti ʔnaj wasu a jau ta iz~raan na na inpanna.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗進去.狗在床旁邊叫.
The dog entered ... The dog barked by the bed.

S.FORM: tangayawan na inpanna ya peRasku a yau maiti tu simpez.
S.PHON: taŋajawan na inpanna ja pəʁasku a jau maiti tu simpəz~r.
S.FORM: tangayawan na inpanna ya peRasku a yau maiti tu simpez.
S.PHON: taŋajawan na inpanna ja pəʁasku a jau maiti tu simpəz~r.
S.TRANSL: 床前面的瓶子沒有東西.
There was nothing in the bottle in front of the bed.

S.FORM: yau tausiqan 'nay nani.
S.PHON: jau tausiqan ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: yau tausiqan 'nay nani.
S.PHON: jau tausiqan ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 在另外一個地方,
In somewhere else,

S.FORM: izaannati na wasu a yau peRasku 'nay niqazuanan na 'nay biyat isisannati na wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: iz~raannati na wasu a jau pəʁasku ʔnaj niqaz~ruanan na ʔnaj βijat isisannati na wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: izaannati na wasu a yau peRasku 'nay niqazuanan na 'nay biyat isisannati na wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: iz~raannati na wasu a jau pəʁasku ʔnaj niqaz~ruanan na ʔnaj βijat isisannati na wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 狗把裝青蛙的瓶子抬起來.
The dog lifted the bottle, in which the frog was put.

S.FORM: 'nay peRasku a yau maiti tu simpez.
S.PHON: ʔnaj pəʁasku a jau maiti tu simpəz~r.
S.FORM: 'nay peRasku a yau maiti tu simpez.
S.PHON: ʔnaj pəʁasku a jau maiti tu simpəz~r.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子裡面沒有東西.
There was nothing in the bottle.

S.FORM: mRaRiwti ya biyat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti ja βijat a jau.
S.FORM: mRaRiwti ya biyat a yau.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti ja βijat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙跑掉了.
The frog ran away.

S.FORM: yauti pamengti qmeqeqeRas a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti paməŋti qməqəqəʁas a sunis a jau.
S.FORM: yauti pamengti qmeqeqeRas a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti paməŋti qməqəqəʁas a sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩一直叫.
The child kept yelling.

S.FORM: tmangan tu lepawna.
S.PHON: tmaŋan tu rəpawna.
S.FORM: tmangan tu lepawna.
S.PHON: tmaŋan tu rəpawna.
S.TRANSL: 他開他家的門.
He opened the door of his house.

S.FORM: wiyati.
S.PHON: wijati.
S.FORM: wiyati.
S.PHON: wijati.
S.TRANSL: 離開了.
left.

S.FORM: tanganan na sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: taŋanan na sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tanganan na sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: taŋanan na sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩開門.
The child opened the door.

S.FORM: yauti ta tantanganan tmayta sunis a yau tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.PHON: jauti ta tantaŋanan tmajta sunis a jau tu βijat a jau sajz~ra.
S.FORM: yauti ta tantanganan tmayta sunis a yau tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.PHON: jauti ta tantaŋanan tmajta sunis a jau tu βijat a jau sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在走廊上看青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: The child saw (looked for) the frog in the hallway.

S.TRANSL: The child saw the frog in the hallway.

S.FORM: wiyati wasu 'nay u.
S.PHON: wijati wasu ʔnaj u.
S.FORM: wiyati wasu 'nay u.
S.PHON: wijati wasu ʔnaj u.
S.TRANSL: 狗先走了.
The dog left.

S.FORM: qaysuRan na wasu a yau a peRasku 'nay.
S.PHON: qajsuʁan na wasu a jau a pəʁasku ʔnaj.
S.FORM: qaysuRan na wasu a yau a peRasku 'nay.
S.PHON: qajsuʁan na wasu a jau a pəʁasku ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗鑽進瓶子裡.
The dog entered the bottle.

S.FORM: ngibiR na peRasku 'nay qaysuR uRuna tateRaqan ngibiR na peRasku.
S.PHON: ŋiβiʁ na pəʁasku ʔnaj qajsuʁ uʁuna tatəʁaqan ŋiβiʁ na pəʁasku.
S.FORM: ngibiR na peRasku 'nay qaysuR uRuna tateRaqan ngibiR na peRasku.
S.PHON: ŋiβiʁ na pəʁasku ʔnaj qajsuʁ uʁuna tatəʁaqan ŋiβiʁ na pəʁasku.
S.TRANSL: 牠的頭進入瓶子口裡.
His head entered the bottle.

S.FORM: m yauti alaannati na sunis a yau 'nay wasu a yau.
S.PHON: m jauti araannati na sunis a jau ʔnaj wasu a jau.
S.FORM: m yauti alaannati na sunis a yau 'nay wasu a yau.
S.PHON: m jauti araannati na sunis a jau ʔnaj wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子把狗拿起來.
The child took the dog.

S.FORM: bawaannati na sunis a yau a wasu a yau.
S.PHON: βawaannati na sunis a jau a wasu a jau.
S.FORM: bawaannati na sunis a yau a wasu a yau.
S.PHON: βawaannati na sunis a jau a wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抱著狗.
The child held the dog in the arms.

S.FORM: tazianti ya qmqeqeRasti sunis 'nay tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.PHON: taz~rianti ja qmqəqəʁasti sunis ʔnaj tu βijat a jau sajz~ra.
S.FORM: tazianti ya qmqeqeRasti sunis 'nay tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.PHON: taz~rianti ja qmqəqəʁasti sunis ʔnaj tu βijat a jau sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩可能在這裡叫那隻青蛙.
The child perhaps called for the frog here.

S.FORM: maiti biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: maiti biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙沒在這.
The frog was not here.

S.FORM: yau tazian 'nay usiq 'nay bunguR na 'nay paRin.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj βuŋuʁ na ʔnaj paʁin.
S.FORM: yau tazian 'nay usiq 'nay bunguR na 'nay paRin.
S.PHON: jau taz~rian ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj βuŋuʁ na ʔnaj paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一棵樹.
There was a tree here.

S.FORM: yau maziut tababawan na paRin a yau ya nianu 'nay smani ta babaw na paRin niziutan.
S.PHON: jau maz~riut taβaβawan na paʁin a jau ja nianu ʔnaj smani ta βaβaw na paʁin niz~riutan.
S.FORM: yau maziut tababawan na paRin a yau ya nianu 'nay smani ta babaw na paRin niziutan.
S.PHON: jau maz~riut taβaβawan na paʁin a jau ja nianu ʔnaj smani ta βaβaw na paʁin niz~riutan.
S.TRANSL: 樹上吊了什麼東西.
There was something hung on the tree.

S.FORM: ti Raytunguzan na wasu a zau ta bunguRan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: ti ʁajtuŋuz~ran na wasu a z~rau ta βuŋuʁan na paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: ti Raytunguzan na wasu a zau ta bunguRan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: ti ʁajtuŋuz~ran na wasu a z~rau ta βuŋuʁan na paʁin a jau.
S.TRANSL: 狗在樹的旁邊叫.
The dog barked by the tree.

S.FORM: nani yau sunis a zau tmayta tu tu biyat a yau tazian ta izaan u ta liapan na paRin.
S.PHON: nani jau sunis a z~rau tmajta tu tu βijat a jau taz~rian ta iz~raan u ta riapan na paʁin.
S.FORM: nani yau sunis a zau tmayta tu tu biyat a yau tazian ta izaan u ta liapan na paRin.
S.PHON: nani jau sunis a z~rau tmajta tu tu βijat a jau taz~rian ta iz~raan u ta riapan na paʁin.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩子在某處 ... 或是在樹的下面看(找)青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 小孩子在某處 ... 或是在樹的下面看 青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: The child saw (looked for) frog somewhere ... or under the tree.

S.TRANSL: The child saw frog somewhere ... or under the tree.

S.FORM: yauti pamengti muRing sunis a zau.
S.PHON: jauti paməŋti muʁiŋ sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: yauti pamengti muRing sunis a zau.
S.PHON: jauti paməŋti muʁiŋ sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩突然哭.
This child suddenly cried.

S.FORM: tazian yau a usiq mutun.
S.PHON: taz~rian jau a usiq mutun.
S.FORM: tazian yau a usiq mutun.
S.PHON: taz~rian jau a usiq mutun.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一隻老鼠.
There was a mouse here.

S.FORM: yau wasu 'nay situqaw pasazi ta babawan na na paRin mRaytunguz wasu a yau.
S.PHON: jau wasu ʔnaj situqaw pasaz~ri ta βaβawan na na paʁin mʁajtuŋuz~r wasu a jau.
S.FORM: yau wasu 'nay situqaw pasazi ta babawan na na paRin mRaytunguz wasu a yau.
S.PHON: jau wasu ʔnaj situqaw pasaz~ri ta βaβawan na na paʁin mʁajtuŋuz~r wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗在吠.
The dog barked.

S.FORM: yau ngid zaqis 'nay wasu 'nay tapaRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: jau ŋiɮ z~raqis ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj tapaʁinan ʔnaj.
S.FORM: yau ngid zaqis 'nay wasu 'nay tapaRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: jau ŋiɮ z~raqis ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj tapaʁinan ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想要爬上那棵樹.
The dog wanted to climb up the tree.

S.FORM: nani yau a mutun a yau ta melanayan.
S.PHON: nani jau a mutun a jau ta məranajan.
S.FORM: nani yau a mutun a yau ta melanayan.
S.PHON: nani jau a mutun a jau ta məranajan.
S.TRANSL: 地上有一隻老鼠.
There was a mouse on the ground.

S.FORM: nani wiyati sunis a yau mzaqis ta babawan na paRin tmuqaz pasazi ta mzaqis tababaw na paRin.
S.PHON: nani wijati sunis a jau mz~raqis ta βaβawan na paʁin tmuqaz~r pasaz~ri ta mz~raqis taβaβaw na paʁin.
S.FORM: nani wiyati sunis a yau mzaqis ta babawan na paRin tmuqaz pasazi ta mzaqis tababaw na paRin.
S.PHON: nani wijati sunis a jau mz~raqis ta βaβawan na paʁin tmuqaz~r pasaz~ri ta mz~raqis taβaβaw na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 小孩離開並且爬上一棵樹.
The child left and climbed up onto a tree.

S.FORM: sunis a yau tmayta.
S.PHON: sunis a jau tmajta.
S.FORM: sunis a yau tmayta.
S.PHON: sunis a jau tmajta.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩看,
The child looked,

S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a usiq 'nay adam a yau 'nay.
S.PHON: tajtaanna nani jau a usiq ʔnaj aɮam a jau ʔnaj.
S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a usiq 'nay adam a yau 'nay.
S.PHON: tajtaanna nani jau a usiq ʔnaj aɮam a jau ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 看了之後,有一隻鳥.
looked. There was a bird.

S.FORM: ku.
S.PHON: ku.
S.FORM: ku.
S.PHON: ku.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹.
An owl.

S.FORM: yau ku a yau tababaw na paRin nani.
S.PHON: jau ku a jau taβaβaw na paʁin nani.
S.FORM: yau ku a yau tababaw na paRin nani.
S.PHON: jau ku a jau taβaβaw na paʁin nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻貓頭鷹在樹的上面.
There was an owl on the tree.

S.FORM: muRetutti sunis a yau suzitang.
S.PHON: muʁətutti sunis a jau suz~ritaŋ.
S.FORM: muRetutti sunis a yau suzitang.
S.PHON: muʁətutti sunis a jau suz~ritaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩被嚇到,往後掉.
The child was frightened and fell backwards.

S.FORM: mqulingti sunis 'nay nayzi ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: mquriŋti sunis ʔnaj najz~ri ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.FORM: mqulingti sunis 'nay nayzi ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: mquriŋti sunis ʔnaj najz~ri ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩從樹上滾下來.
The child rolled down from the tree.

S.FORM: suRawti pasazi talibeng.
S.PHON: suʁawti pasaz~ri tariβəŋ.
S.FORM: suRawti pasazi talibeng.
S.PHON: suʁawti pasaz~ri tariβəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 往下掉.
fell down.

S.FORM: suzitangti sunis a yau.
S.PHON: suz~ritaŋti sunis a jau.
S.FORM: suzitangti sunis a yau.
S.PHON: suz~ritaŋti sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩躺在 .
The child lay .

S.FORM: yauti wasu 'nay mRaytunuz.
S.PHON: jauti wasu ʔnaj mʁajtunuz~r.
S.FORM: yauti wasu 'nay mRaytunuz.
S.PHON: jauti wasu ʔnaj mʁajtunuz~r.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗又在叫.
The dog was barking.

S.FORM: mlazutti mRaRiw wasu 'nay tmanuz.
S.PHON: mraz~rutti mʁaʁiw wasu ʔnaj tmanuz~r.
S.FORM: mlazutti mRaRiw wasu 'nay tmanuz.
S.PHON: mraz~rutti mʁaʁiw wasu ʔnaj tmanuz~r.
S.TRANSL: 狗跑得很快.追....
The dog ran fast, chasing .

S.FORM: yau 'nay nani 'nay ku 'nay tababaw tmanbaseR.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj nani ʔnaj ku ʔnaj taβaβaw tmanβasəʁ.
S.FORM: yau 'nay nani 'nay ku 'nay tababaw tmanbaseR.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj nani ʔnaj ku ʔnaj taβaβaw tmanβasəʁ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹在上面飛.
The owl flew above.

S.FORM: maytis qa qaqaRatan na u qumuni smani na adam a yau a sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: majtis qa qaqaʁatan na u qumuni smani na aɮam a jau a sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: maytis qa qaqaRatan na u qumuni smani na adam a yau a sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: majtis qa qaqaʁatan na u qumuni smani na aɮam a jau a sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子怕鳥會咬他.
The child was afraid that the bird would bite him.

S.FORM: pasababawannati 'nay limana mimet.
S.PHON: pasaβaβawannati ʔnaj rimana mimət.
S.FORM: pasababawannati 'nay limana mimet.
S.PHON: pasaβaβawannati ʔnaj rimana mimət.
S.TRANSL: 他的手怎麼往上抓呢?
Why did his hand grab upwards?

S.FORM: tmalawmati sayza tu iza u tu iRuR.
S.PHON: tmarawmati sajz~ra tu iz~ra u tu iʁuʁ.
S.FORM: tmalawmati sayza tu iza u tu iRuR.
S.PHON: tmarawmati sajz~ra tu iz~ra u tu iʁuʁ.
S.TRANSL: 可能是要穿過什麼 ... 河.
Maybe to cross ... a river.

S.FORM: yau a iRuR a zau tazian.
S.PHON: jau a iʁuʁ a z~rau taz~rian.
S.FORM: yau a iRuR a zau tazian.
S.PHON: jau a iʁuʁ a z~rau taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一條河.
There was a river here.

S.FORM: talawmapa sayza sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tarawmapa sajz~ra sunis a jau.
S.FORM: talawmapa sayza sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tarawmapa sajz~ra sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩好像要過河.
The child was going to cross the river.

S.FORM: a mzaqis tu 'nay siRmuq 'nay sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: a mz~raqis tu ʔnaj siʁmuq ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: a mzaqis tu 'nay siRmuq 'nay sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: a mz~raqis tu ʔnaj siʁmuq ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上鹿.
The child climbed up onto the deer.

S.FORM: yau tababawna tuRuzna na siRmuq a yau 'nay sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jau taβaβawna tuʁuz~rna na siʁmuq a jau ʔnaj sunis a jau.
S.FORM: yau tababawna tuRuzna na siRmuq a yau 'nay sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jau taβaβawna tuʁuz~rna na siʁmuq a jau ʔnaj sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在鹿的上面...背上.
The child was up on the back of the deer.

S.FORM: qmeqeRas tu 'nay wasuna sayza.
S.PHON: qməqəʁas tu ʔnaj wasuna sajz~ra.
S.FORM: qmeqeRas tu 'nay wasuna sayza.
S.PHON: qməqəʁas tu ʔnaj wasuna sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 可能在叫他的狗.
Maybe he called for his dog.

S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna na.
S.PHON: jau ta tuʁuz~ranna na.
S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna na.
S.PHON: jau ta tuʁuz~ranna na.
S.TRANSL: 在...背上.
Behind the...

S.FORM: na na iza 'nay u qunianna sikawma smani qaya.
S.PHON: na na iz~ra ʔnaj u qunianna sikawma smani qaja.
S.FORM: na na iza 'nay u qunianna sikawma smani qaya.
S.PHON: na na iz~ra ʔnaj u qunianna sikawma smani qaja.
S.TRANSL: 我們不知道要怎麼去講.
We don't know how to say it.

S.FORM: tatuRuzanna na siRmuq tatuRuzan na siRmuq 'nay wasu 'nay tmalunti.
S.PHON: tatuʁuz~ranna na siʁmuq tatuʁuz~ran na siʁmuq ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj tmarunti.
S.FORM: tatuRuzanna na siRmuq tatuRuzan na siRmuq 'nay wasu 'nay tmalunti.
S.PHON: tatuʁuz~ranna na siʁmuq tatuʁuz~ran na siʁmuq ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj tmarunti.
S.TRANSL: 狗躲在鹿的後面.
The dog hid behind the deer.

S.FORM: pameng qmqeqeRas a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: paməŋ qmqəqəʁas a sunis a jau.
S.FORM: pameng qmqeqeRas a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: paməŋ qmqəqəʁas a sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩白叫了.
The child yelled in vain.

S.FORM: nani yauti tazian.
S.PHON: nani jauti taz~rian.
S.FORM: nani yauti tazian.
S.PHON: nani jauti taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 在這裡.
Here.

S.FORM: yauti zaqisannati a uRuna na sunis 'nay zaqisanna uRuna na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: jauti z~raqisannati a uʁuna na sunis ʔnaj z~raqisanna uʁuna na siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: yauti zaqisannati a uRuna na sunis 'nay zaqisanna uRuna na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: jauti z~raqisannati a uʁuna na sunis ʔnaj z~raqisanna uʁuna na siʁmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上那隻鹿的頭.
The child climbed up onto the deer's head.

S.FORM: na sunis a yau yau tawakianna tangi siRmuq 'nay.
S.PHON: na sunis a jau jau tawakianna taŋi siʁmuq ʔnaj.
S.FORM: na sunis a yau yau tawakianna tangi siRmuq 'nay.
S.PHON: na sunis a jau jau tawakianna taŋi siʁmuq ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩現在在那隻鹿的角上面.
The child was on the deer's horn now.

S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna ya wasu.
S.PHON: jau ta tuʁuz~ranna ja wasu.
S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna ya wasu.
S.PHON: jau ta tuʁuz~ranna ja wasu.
S.TRANSL: 狗在鹿的後面.
The dog was behind the deer.

S.FORM: nani wiyati qaniyau tangi smaqay.
S.PHON: nani wijati qanijau taŋi smaqaj.
S.FORM: nani wiyati qaniyau tangi smaqay.
S.PHON: nani wijati qanijau taŋi smaqaj.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開,走開.
They left, and walked away.

S.FORM: pasazipa ta nawnaungan sayza ya.
S.PHON: pasaz~ripa ta nawnauŋan sajz~ra ja.
S.FORM: pasazipa ta nawnaungan sayza ya.
S.PHON: pasaz~ripa ta nawnauŋan sajz~ra ja.
S.TRANSL: 可能往山的方向走.
Probably toward the mountains.

S.FORM: smaqay makezi tazian qaniyau sayza tangi.
S.PHON: smaqaj makəz~ri taz~rian qanijau sajz~ra taŋi.
S.FORM: smaqay makezi tazian qaniyau sayza tangi.
S.PHON: smaqaj makəz~ri taz~rian qanijau sajz~ra taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 他們現在可能從這邊走.
Now they probably walked from here.

S.FORM: nani yau Raytunuz a wasu a yau tu siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jau ʁajtunuz~r a wasu a jau tu siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: nani yau Raytunuz a wasu a yau tu siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: nani jau ʁajtunuz~r a wasu a jau tu siʁmuq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗對著鹿吠.
The dog barked at the deer.

S.FORM: yau tababaw na uRuna pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau ya sunis a yau tangi.
S.PHON: jau taβaβaw na uʁuna pamuquanna na na siʁmuq a jau ja sunis a jau taŋi.
S.FORM: yau tababaw na uRuna pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau ya sunis a yau tangi.
S.PHON: jau taβaβaw na uʁuna pamuquanna na na siʁmuq a jau ja sunis a jau taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在鹿的頭上,被鹿扛起來.
The child was on the head of the deer, carried by the deer.

S.FORM: nani suRawti.
S.PHON: nani suʁawti.
S.FORM: nani suRawti.
S.PHON: nani suʁawti.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒了.
fell.

S.FORM: mqulingti a.
S.PHON: mquriŋti a.
S.FORM: mqulingti a.
S.PHON: mquriŋti a.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒了.
fell.

S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay sunis a yau nayzi tauRuanna na iza luqenaw a yau.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj sunis a jau najz~ri tauʁuanna na iz~ra ruqənaw a jau.
S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay sunis a yau nayzi tauRuanna na iza luqenaw a yau.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj sunis a jau najz~ri tauʁuanna na iz~ra ruqənaw a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩從什麼東西 ... 從那隻老虎的頭上掉下來.
The child fell down from something ... from the tiger's head.

S.FORM: a usa luqenaw zinku 'nay siRmuq.
S.PHON: a usa ruqənaw z~rinku ʔnaj siʁmuq.
S.FORM: a usa luqenaw zinku 'nay siRmuq.
S.PHON: a usa ruqənaw z~rinku ʔnaj siʁmuq.
S.TRANSL: 啊,不是老虎,是鹿.
No, not tiger. The deer.

S.FORM: siRmuq a yau tmibuqti a ni pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau tu sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: siʁmuq a jau tmiβuqti a ni pamuquanna na na siʁmuq a jau tu sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: siRmuq a yau tmibuqti a ni pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau tu sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: siʁmuq a jau tmiβuqti a ni pamuquanna na na siʁmuq a jau tu sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿扛的那個小孩掉下來了.
The child carried by the deer fell.

S.FORM: tmibuqti wiyati pasazi ta talibeng wasu a yau qaya mqulingti pasazi talibengan.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti wijati pasaz~ri ta tariβəŋ wasu a jau qaja mquriŋti pasaz~ri tariβəŋan.
S.FORM: tmibuqti wiyati pasazi ta talibeng wasu a yau qaya mqulingti pasazi talibengan.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti wijati pasaz~ri ta tariβəŋ wasu a jau qaja mquriŋti pasaz~ri tariβəŋan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩往地上掉下去,狗也掉往地上.
The child fell down and the dog fell down, too.

S.FORM: wasu a yau.
S.PHON: wasu a jau.
S.FORM: wasu a yau.
S.PHON: wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 狗掉到下面.
The dog fell down.

S.FORM: tmibuq pasazi ta melanayan 'nay sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuq pasaz~ri ta məranajan ʔnaj sunis a jau atu wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: tmibuq pasazi ta melanayan 'nay sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuq pasaz~ri ta məranajan ʔnaj sunis a jau atu wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗掉到地上.
The child and the dog fell down to the ground.

S.FORM: pamengti yau tababawanna na tababaw na betu sayza 'nay siRmuq a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau taβaβawanna na taβaβaw na βətu sajz~ra ʔnaj siʁmuq a z~rau.
S.FORM: pamengti yau tababawanna na tababaw na betu sayza 'nay siRmuq a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau taβaβawanna na taβaβaw na βətu sajz~ra ʔnaj siʁmuq a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿怎麼會在石頭上?
Why was this deer on the rock?

S.FORM: nani yauti tazanzanuman tmibuq tazanzanuman ka.
S.PHON: nani jauti taz~ranz~ranuman tmiβuq taz~ranz~ranuman ka.
S.FORM: nani yauti tazanzanuman tmibuq tazanzanuman ka.
S.PHON: nani jauti taz~ranz~ranuman tmiβuq taz~ranz~ranuman ka.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到水裡.
The fell into the water.

S.FORM: nani tmibuq alaannati na sunis a zau ya wasu a yau nayzi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.PHON: nani tmiβuq araannati na sunis a z~rau ja wasu a jau najz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman qanijau.
S.FORM: nani tmibuq alaannati na sunis a zau ya wasu a yau nayzi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.PHON: nani tmiβuq araannati na sunis a z~rau ja wasu a jau najz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman qanijau.
S.TRANSL: 小狗掉到水裡,被小男孩從水裡抱上來.
The dog fell into the water, and was held up by the child.

S.FORM: yau a usiq paRin a yau bunguR na paRin.
S.PHON: jau a usiq paʁin a jau βuŋuʁ na paʁin.
S.FORM: yau a usiq paRin a yau bunguR na paRin.
S.PHON: jau a usiq paʁin a jau βuŋuʁ na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 有一棵樹...樹幹.
There ws a tree...a trunk of a tree.

S.FORM: yauti taqazqazan sunis a zau na qalimetka zinna tu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: jauti taqaz~rqaz~ran sunis a z~rau na qarimətka z~rinna tu wasu a jau.
S.FORM: yauti taqazqazan sunis a zau na qalimetka zinna tu wasu a yau.
S.PHON: jauti taqaz~rqaz~ran sunis a z~rau na qarimətka z~rinna tu wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在岸邊,跟那隻狗說,「安靜」.
The child was by the shore, and told the dog, 'Be quiet.'

S.FORM: ngidanna ala sayza.
S.PHON: ŋiɮanna ara sajz~ra.
S.FORM: ngidanna ala sayza.
S.PHON: ŋiɮanna ara sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 他想要拿那個.
He wanted to take that.

S.FORM: mnanguy tazanzanuman a wasu a zau stangi.
S.PHON: mnaŋuj taz~ranz~ranuman a wasu a z~rau staŋi.
S.FORM: mnanguy tazanzanuman a wasu a zau stangi.
S.PHON: mnaŋuj taz~ranz~ranuman a wasu a z~rau staŋi.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗現在在水裡游泳.
The dog was swimming in the water.

S.FORM: tu mala tu paRin na bunguR na paRin sa zaqisanna qaniyau stangi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.PHON: tu mara tu paʁin na βuŋuʁ na paʁin sa z~raqisanna qanijau staŋi taz~ranz~ranuman qanijau.
S.FORM: tu mala tu paRin na bunguR na paRin sa zaqisanna qaniyau stangi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.PHON: tu mara tu paʁin na βuŋuʁ na paʁin sa z~raqisanna qanijau staŋi taz~ranz~ranuman qanijau.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水裡爬上樹幹.
They climbed up to the trunk of the tree in the water.

S.FORM: yauti ta babaw na paRin tangi mzaqis qaniyau ta izaan u tababaw na paRin.
S.PHON: jauti ta βaβaw na paʁin taŋi mz~raqis qanijau ta iz~raan u taβaβaw na paʁin.
S.FORM: yauti ta babaw na paRin tangi mzaqis qaniyau ta izaan u tababaw na paRin.
S.PHON: jauti ta βaβaw na paʁin taŋi mz~raqis qanijau ta iz~raan u taβaβaw na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬上什麼東西,樹的上面.
They climbed up onto something, the top of a tree.

S.FORM: qapilayanti sayza mnananguy.
S.PHON: qapirajanti sajz~ra mnanaŋuj.
S.FORM: qapilayanti sayza mnananguy.
S.PHON: qapirajanti sajz~ra mnanaŋuj.
S.TRANSL: 他們游來游去,游得很累了.
They were swimming, and were tired.

S.FORM: taytaanna yau a uzusa biyat a yau tazian ta kinilanna na paRin a yau Rayaay paRin.
S.PHON: tajtaanna jau a uz~rusa βijat a jau taz~rian ta kiniranna na paʁin a jau ʁajaaj paʁin.
S.FORM: taytaanna yau a uzusa biyat a yau tazian ta kinilanna na paRin a yau Rayaay paRin.
S.PHON: tajtaanna jau a uz~rusa βijat a jau taz~rian ta kiniranna na paʁin a jau ʁajaaj paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到這裡有兩隻青蛙,在大樹的旁邊.
They saw there were two frogs here, beside a big tree.

S.FORM: zaqisannati na na sunis a zau atu wasu 'nay 'nay paRin a yau tmalaw na sayza ta izaan taiRuRan.
S.PHON: z~raqisannati na na sunis a z~rau atu wasu ʔnaj ʔnaj paʁin a jau tmaraw na sajz~ra ta iz~raan taiʁuʁan.
S.FORM: zaqisannati na na sunis a zau atu wasu 'nay 'nay paRin a yau tmalaw na sayza ta izaan taiRuRan.
S.PHON: z~raqisannati na na sunis a z~rau atu wasu ʔnaj ʔnaj paʁin a jau tmaraw na sajz~ra ta iz~raan taiʁuʁan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗爬上樹幹,可能穿越了河.
The child and the dog climbed up onto the tree and maybe crossed the river.

S.FORM: mwaza yau biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra jau βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mwaza yau biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra jau βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 有很多青蛙.
There were lots of frogs.

S.FORM: yaupama tangi tazanzanuman tangi sunis a zau atu wasu a zau.
S.PHON: jaupama taŋi taz~ranz~ranuman taŋi sunis a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau.
S.FORM: yaupama tangi tazanzanuman tangi sunis a zau atu wasu a zau.
S.PHON: jaupama taŋi taz~ranz~ranuman taŋi sunis a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子和狗現在還在水中.
The child and the dog were still in the water.

S.FORM: maipama syaqazqaz.
S.PHON: maipama sjaqaz~rqaz~r.
S.FORM: maipama syaqazqaz.
S.PHON: maipama sjaqaz~rqaz~r.
S.TRANSL: 還沒到岸邊.
They hadn't arrived at the shore.

S.FORM: yau mwaza biyat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: jau mwaz~ra βijat a jau ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.FORM: yau mwaza biyat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: jau mwaz~ra βijat a jau ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 在樹的上面有很多青蛙.
There were lots of frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: mzaqis 'nay biyat a zau mniz mazmun ka.
S.PHON: mz~raqis ʔnaj βijat a z~rau mniz~r maz~rmun ka.
S.FORM: mzaqis 'nay biyat a zau mniz mazmun ka.
S.PHON: mz~raqis ʔnaj βijat a z~rau mniz~r maz~rmun ka.
S.TRANSL: 很多的青蛙全部爬上去.

TRANSL.notes: Lots of frogs, all climbed up (onto the trunk).

S.TRANSL: Lots of frogs, all climbed up .
